page.title: EIM: Extension Interface Model
page.description: The SPEC define the interface between the host and the extension.
page.bodyHtml:
The SPEC define the interface between the host and the extension.

  1. See spec.md for the full specification.
  2. See usage.md for how different role use the interface.
  3. See uprobe.md for the example of uprobe role

headings.text: The SPEC define the interface between the host and the extension.

index.title: bpftime
index.description: High-performance userspace eBPF runtime and extension framework for production tracing, runtime extension, and low-overhead instrumentation.

next.title: EIM: Extension Interface Model Specification
next.description: EIM is a framework for describing fine-grained interactions between extensions (plugins) and a host application. Its central principle is the principle of least privilege: each extension should receive only the minimal r
